creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
(In reply to dewayne from comment #4)
Cy, you pointed me to the correct location for the search.  Ultimately I manually
# sh -x 
# SH=`which sh`; FIND=`which find`; CPIO=`which cpio`; _SHAREMODE=644;
+ which sh
+ SH=/bin/sh
+ which find
+ FIND=/usr/bin/find
+ which cpio
+ CPIO=/usr/bin/cpio
+ _SHAREMODE=644
#
# cd /var/ports/big/ports/mail/spamassassin/work/Mail-SpamAssassin-4.0.0 && /bin/sh -xc '(/usr/bin/find -Ed $1 $3 | /usr/bin/cpio -dumpl $2 >/dev/null 2>&1) &&  /usr/bin/find -Ed $1 $3 \(   -type d -exec /bin/sh -xc '\''cd '\''$2'\'' && chmod 755 "$@"'\'' . {} +  -o -type f -exec /bin/sh -xc '\''cd '\''$2'\'' && chmod 0644 "$@"'\'' . {} + \)' COPYTREE_SHARE "sql ldap" /var/ports/big/ports/mail/spamassassin/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/spamassassin

Lots of microsteps...

cd /var/ports/big/ports/mail/spamassassin/work/Mail-SpamAssassin-4.0.0 && find -Ed ldap sql | /usr/bin/cpio -dumpl /var/ports/big/ports/mail/spamassassin/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/spamassassin
+ cd /var/ports/big/ports/mail/spamassassin/work/Mail-SpamAssassin-4.0.0
+ find -Ed ldap sql
+ /usr/bin/cpio -dumpl /var/ports/big/ports/mail/spamassassin/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/spamassassin
cpio: Cannot extract through symlink /var/ports/big/ports/mail/spamassassin/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/spamassassin/ldap/README <==== ***

So ... after building 479 packages, spamassassin failed due to a symlink
# file /var/ports
/var/ports: symbolic link to /big/portswrk

a quick change of WRKDIRPREFIX=           /big/portswrk
and
# ls -lh /packages/All/spamassassin-4.0.0_4.pkg
-rw-r--r--  2 root  wheel   1.1M Oct 13 18:07 /packages/All/spamassassin-4.0.0_4.pkg

Thank-you.  You were right, it was cpio ;)
